result:
Clean build succeeded with no errors and the `wpa_supplicant` binary was produced. The only warning present (`wpa_cli.c:4087`, a pre-existing `!` vs `==` precedence issue) is unrelated to this change.

Summary of changes:
- `src/utils/os.h`: `os_get_time` now takes `int clock_source` as a second parameter.
- `src/utils/os_unix.c`: definition updated to accept `clock_source` (unused, behavior unchanged since only value 0 is meaningful).
- `src/utils/os_win32.c`, `src/utils/os_none.c`, `src/utils/os_internal.c`: sibling platform definitions updated to match the new signature for consistency (not part of this build, but kept in sync with the header).
- All ~30 call sites repo-wide (wpa_supplicant, hostapd/ap code, EAP, TLS, RADIUS, PAE, wps, etc.) updated to pass `0` as the new argument.

`make` in `wpa_supplicant/` completes green.
